executives.name: George Kurtz
executives.background: George Kurtz is our co-founder and has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our board of directors since November 2011. From October 2009 to September 2011, Mr. Kurtz served as Worldwide Chief Technology Officer of McAfee, Inc., a computer security software company. Prior to that, Mr. Kurtz served in various other positions at McAfee, including Senior Vice President and General Manager, Risk Management from October 2005 to October 2009. Mr. Kurtz co-founded Foundstone, Inc., a worldwide security products and services company, and served as its Chief Executive Officer from October 1999 until its acquisition by McAfee in October 2004.

tenure_dates.title: Worldwide Chief Technology Officer and Executive Vice President

executives.name: Nigel Hearne
executives.background: Executive Vice President, Oil, Products & Gas since 2022.

executives.name: Raja Maharajh
executives.background: Raja Maharajh is Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary of RTX.

tenure_dates.title: Various legal roles, including Vice President and Counsel for Pratt & Whitney Commercial Engines

executives.name: Jeffrey Henley
executives.background: Mr. Henley has been Vice Chairman of the Board since September 2014. He served as Chairman of the Board from 2004 to 2014 and as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer from 1991 to 2004.

board_of_directors.name: Edward Barnholt
board_of_directors.background: Edward Barnholt is the Chairman of the Board of KLA. He was formerly the President and CEO of Agilent Technologies, Inc.
